translations.networkError: We could not connect. Check your internet connection and try again.
translations.badRequestError: Some information was not accepted. Check your details and try again.
translations.unauthorizedError: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
translations.forbiddenError: You do not have permission to perform this action.
translations.notFoundError: The requested information could not be found.
translations.conflictError: This request conflicts with a recent change. Refresh and try again.
translations.rateLimitedError: Too many requests were made. Please wait a moment and try again.
translations.serverError: Our service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
translations.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
translations.signInIntro: Sign in to your ShoppyShop account
translations.emptyBasketDetail: Discover something considered, useful, or unexpectedly delightful.
translations.deliveryCalculated: Delivery and discounts are calculated at checkout.
translations.removeProductMessage: This item will be removed from your basket.
translations.clearBasketMessage: All {$itemCount} items will be removed. This cannot be undone.
translations.productEditorialDescription: Chosen from {$INTERPOLATION} for its balance of thoughtful design, everyday usefulness and lasting quality. This {$INTERPOLATION_1} piece has been selected to feel at home in your routine from day one.
translations.productDispatchDescription: Every order is carefully checked and packed before dispatch, with clear delivery updates from our door to yours.
translations.consideredChoice: {$START_TAG_STRONG}Considered choice{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG}Selected for useful design and dependable quality.
translations.qualityChecked: {$START_TAG_STRONG}Quality checked{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG}Inspected before it leaves our fulfilment partner.
translations.easyReturn: {$START_TAG_STRONG}Easy to return{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG}Change your mind within 30 days of delivery.
translations.trackedDeliveryDetail: Dispatch estimates appear at checkout, followed by tracking updates.
translations.simpleReturnsDetail: Send it back within 30 days in its original condition.
translations.hereToHelpDetail: Our customer team can help with product and order questions.
translations.productRemoved: This product may have been removed.
translations.shopProductsIntro: Explore thoughtfully selected products for everyday life and memorable journeys.
translations.categoriesLoadError: We could not load the product categories
translations.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.
translations.noCategories: No product categories are available yet
translations.newCollectionsSoon: New collections will appear here soon.
translations.name: Name
translations.deliveryIntro: Tell us where your order should arrive.
translations.contactInformationDetail: We’ll use these details for delivery updates.
translations.deliveryAddressDetail: Choose an address where someone can receive the parcel.
translations.orderConfirmationDetail: Your new order {$START_TAG_STRONG}{$INTERPOLATION}{$CLOSE_TAG_STRONG} has been placed successfully. We sent the confirmation to {$INTERPOLATION_1}.
translations.orderUnavailableDetail: We could not load this confirmation. Your purchase history may still contain the order.
translations.paymentIntro: Secure mock checkout—no real charge is made and card details are never stored.
translations.mockPaymentDetail: Protected mock payment for portfolio demonstration.
translations.paymentDetailsError: Check the highlighted payment details and try again.
translations.cardholderNameError: Enter the name shown on the card
translations.reviewOrderIntro: Check the details below before placing your order.
translations.placeOrderError: We could not place your order. Please try again.
translations.noFavouritesDetail: Save the products you love and find them waiting here whenever you return.
translations.purchaseHistoryIntro: Review your orders, delivery details and payment summaries.
translations.purchasesLoadError: We could not load your purchases
translations.noPurchasesDetail: When you place an order, its details will appear here.
translations.logoutMessage: Your basket stays on this device, but you will need to sign in again.
